prompt: A sprawling, hyper-detailed architectural monolith. The bottom 90% is a dense, crushing labyrinth of dark, brutalist concrete slums, completely in shadow and suffocatingly squeezed together. Resting precariously on the very tip of a razor-thin spire above the shadows is a tiny, impossibly bright, gleaming golden palace floating in the clouds, illuminated by heavenly sunlight. No text, purely visual metaphor, cinematic lighting, 8k, photorealistic --ar 16:9 --style raw
insight: The sheer, crushing weight and disproportionate spatial reality of the bottom 90% supporting the microscopic, untouchable wealth of the top 1%.
